meta.title: Science, Technology, and the U.S.-Japan Alliance: Introduction, Keynote, and Third Offset Strategy
meta.description: Arthur Herman, Vice Admiral (Ret.) Yoji Koda, Bill Scneider, and Andrew Krepinevich on opportunities for U.S.-Japan cooperation in science and technology in military strategy and defense innovation. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
